creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Don't really know if it makes sense, cause I don't know this tool.
But I am trying to provide an update-patch for it.
But I cannot really test functionality, so @danny want you please test this patch.

Found no really changelog, but it seems only bugfixes.

Testbuilds with poudriere for 10.3-amd64/i386 and 9.3-amd64 ok.
Portlint ok.
----
For option DKIM, bug 211723 is still open.
